text:
EXPLANATION: The "Gurobi Optimizer Reference Manual" by Gurobi Optimization, LLC is a real, well-established official technical reference document hosted at docs.gurobi.com, with the cited title, author, and URL (https://www.gurobi.com) matching exactly the standard academic citation format recommended by Gurobi itself. The year 2024 is a valid edition year for this continuously updated reference manual.

LINK: https://docs.gurobi.com/projects/optimizer/en/current/index.html
FOUND_TITLE: Gurobi Optimizer Reference Manual
FOUND_AUTHORS: Gurobi Optimization, LLC
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
